nodes.name: Fetch Shop Basics
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace credential id above with your n8n Shopify credential ID. Find it in n8n > Settings > Credentials > your Shopify credential > URL (the numeric ID in the URL path).

nodes.name: Fetch Active Products
nodes.notes: Phase 12: fetches first 250 active products (no pagination loop). Pagination for catalogs > 250 products is documented as a known gap — implement via n8n Split In Batches + loop for larger stores.

setupRequired: Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_SHOPIFY_CREDENTIAL_ID in all HTTP Request nodes with the actual n8n credential ID
Ensure STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_SHOP_URL env var is set to your store's .myshopify.com domain
Ensure STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_API_VERSION env var is set to a supported Shopify API version
knownGaps: Pagination: only the first 250 products and collections are fetched. Stores with > 250 items need a pagination loop (Split In Batches node pattern).
Store-level metafields are not fetched in Phase 12. Add a 5th HTTP Request node targeting /metafields.json?metafield[owner_resource]=shop if needed.
CREDENTIAL_AUTH_FAILURE retry (1 retry per spec) not implemented — n8n's built-in retry on the HTTP Request node can cover this.
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1. Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, runtime_config }
storeOs.output: { project_id, artifact_path, artifact_name, import_summary, runtime_config, status }
